version_notes: v1.0.0 establishes career-profile as the profile-intake member of the job-hunter family (split out of the v5.2.0 monolith). It owns the North-Star profile lifecycle (init_profile.py) and resume parsing (parse_resume.py), producing .job-hunter-profile.md plus parsed-resume text per the family workspace-contract. Works standalone; the orchestrator routes to it for Phase 1 understand-the-user.
